**Medical Assessment and Rating Board for Indian System of Medicine**

**National Commission for Indian System of Medicine, New Delhi**

**Assessment Report of Ayurvedic Medical Colleges for the Academic Session 2026-27**

**File no. 3-4/MARB/2025-Ay.(53)**

**Dated:-GOLDEN**

It is submitted that **Raghunath Ayurved Mahavidyalaya & Hospital, Contai, West Bengal (Inst. ID-AYU0265)** was visited on **2026-05-11 and 2026-05-12** to assess the available facilities of teaching and practical training for **Annual visitation for issuance of Annual permission with intake capacity of 50 seats in UG (BAMS) course for the academic session 2026-27 under section 28/29 of NCISM Act, 2020** by the visitors namely:-

| **S. No.** | **Visitor’s Name** | **Visitor ID** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Dr. Akhilesh Kumar Singh | V01713 |
| 2 | Dr. Ramnihor Tapsi Jaiswal | V02899 |
| 3 | Dr. Pankaj Kumar Singh | V03315 |


Further, it is submitted that after examination of the visitation report along with all the annexures submitted by the visitors following Compliance/shortcomings have been observed-

1. **Constructed Area :-** Constructed area of the college is 3092 sq.mt., constructed area of the hospital is 1980 sq.mt. And constructed area of the Herbal garden 8093 sq.mt are fulfilling as per schedule III of MESAR (UG) Ayurveda 2024.
2. **Area of the Common Departments :-** Total Area of Lecture Halls is 500, against the minimum requirement of 400. So, there is a **fulfilling the criteria.**.
3. **Lecture Halls :- No. of lecture hall are 5 against the requirement of 5 and fulfilling the criteria as per Table-1 of MESAR UG Ayurveda 2024.**
4. **Area of the Teaching Departments :- All departments are fulfilling/and shortcoming as per schedule III of MESAR UG Ayurveda,2024.**
5. **Teaching departments :-** Computer and printer are available in dean and MS office.
6. **Central Library:-** Not fulfilling the criteria as per regulation 17 (3) of MESAR (UG) Ayurveda 2024 and details are as under-
    - Sitting arrangement – Non-adequate
    - Sitting capacity-40
    - No. of computer available with internet facility- 4
    - Total number of books -7931
7. **Herbal Garden:-** Number of species is 250 and fulfilling the criteria as per sub-regulation 6 (C) of regulation 19 of MESAR (UG) Ayurveda 2024.
8. **Teaching Pharmacy:-**
    - Functional status- Functional
    - Sitting arrangements- Satisfactory
    - Equipment status – Satisfactory
    - Infrastructure- Satisfactory
    - Quality testing lab is available as per Sub-regulation 7 & 8 of regulation 19 of MESAR (UG) Ayurveda 2024.
9. **Biometric attendance:- Fulfilling the criteria as per Regulation 9 of MESAR UG Ayurveda 2024**
    - Aadhar enabled biometric System to track attendance of the teaching staff – Available
    - Aadhar enabled biometric System to track attendance of the **non-teaching staff** – Available
    - Aadhar enabled biometric System to track attendance of the **Hospital Staff –** Available
10. **College website:-**
    - 1. Information uploaded on college website available as per Regulation 11 of MESAR (UG) Ayurveda 2024.
    - 2. College website:- Functional

**11.Teaching staffs:- Not fulfilling the criteria as per schedule IV of MESAR UG Ayurveda 2024**

1. Yoga teacher is available.
2. Bio-statistician is available.
3. Out of 29 teaching staffs, 0 staff was absent on the day of visitation.

**14. Hospital Infrastructure details-**

**Constructed area of the hospital is fulfilling the requirement as per MESAR UG Ayurveda 2024**

1. **Functionality of the hospital:-**
2. No. of OPD:- 9
3. Total 41848 no. of patients attended OPD against the minimum requirement of 36000 no. of patients.
4. Average attendance of patient in OPD per day is 139.49 against the minimum requirement of 120.
5. Total 1324 no. of patients admitted in IPD.
6. Average bed occupancy percentage is 69.27%.
7. There were 11 deliveries conducted. Labour room is functional.
8. There were 30 operations conducted.
9. Clinical laboratory is functional.
10. Labour room is functional.
11. Ksharsutra block is functional.
12. OPD is functional
13. IPD is functional
14. Computerized central registration system is available.
15. **Mean** of general and essential equipment’s/instruments availability is 98.4%.

16. **Observation by the visitors:-**
17. No ICU is available in the hospital.
18. Death record and intern duty roasters not available.
19. Samhita department does not have a language laboratory.
